_doc: MCP server tiering to reduce MCP Tax (per arXiv 2604.21816). Core servers load schemas every turn. On-demand servers load only when invoked. This file is advisory — actual tier enforcement requires either (a) manually moving servers between .mcp.json and .mcp.on-demand.json, or (b) running /mcp-audit to apply.

core._description: Always loaded. Use for tools called every session — typically 1–2 servers max.

on-demand._description: Loaded only when explicitly invoked. Best for tools used <30% of sessions.

_thresholds.comment: Servers averaging fewer than 5 calls per 50 tool invocations should sit in on-demand tier.
